creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Machine: PowerEdge R7525 with 2x EPYC 7713
FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n257957-975407b1d8d-dirty: Sun Sep 18 10:05:52 MDT 2022

After bumping MAXMEMDOM in acpica from 8 to 16 in an attempt to resolve the boot message "SRAT: Too many memory domains", FreeBSD panics on boot.
